description_long: This is a modern, two-tiered shelving unit with a minimalist design, featuring a rectangular metal frame finished in a light beige or taupe color. The top and lower shelves are made of clear or lightly frosted glass, each supported at the corners by visible round fasteners. The frame is constructed with straight, clean lines and right angles, giving the piece a geometric, open appearance. The lower shelf is offset to one side, creating an asymmetrical profile and additional visual interest. The open sides and back make it easy to access items placed on either shelf, and the glass surfaces provide a sleek, contemporary look suitable for urban environments. The overall construction suggests durability and stability, while the transparent shelves help maintain a sense of lightness.
description: A modern, two-tiered shelving unit with a beige metal frame and clear glass shelves, featuring an open, asymmetrical design. The shelves are supported by visible round fasteners and the structure is both sturdy and visually light.
description_view_0: Front view showing both glass shelves, the offset lower shelf, and the open, rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical offset of the lower shelf and the open frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of both glass shelves and the supporting frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the offset lower shelf and the open, angular design.
